name: wan-huiyan-skill-authoring
description: End-to-end toolkit for authoring, publishing, syncing, auditing, and diagnosing Claude Code skills. Bundles five complementary plugins covering the full skill lifecycle.

plugins.name: publish-skill
plugins.description: Publish Claude Code skills to GitHub and awesome-claude-skills lists with hard-won lessons encoded. Bundled from wan-huiyan/publish-skill.

plugins.name: skill-sync
plugins.description: Keep locally installed Claude Code skills in sync with their GitHub repos. Bundled from wan-huiyan/skill-sync.

plugins.name: skill-portfolio-audit
plugins.description: Run a full quality audit across a portfolio of Claude Code skills and implement all findings. Orchestrates agent-review-panel → plan-review-integrator → parallel subagent implementation. Bundled from wan-huiyan/skill-portfolio-audit.

plugins.name: skill-anonymizer
plugins.description: Scan Claude Code skills for client-specific data and anonymize for safe sharing. Bundled from wan-huiyan/skill-anonymizer.

plugins.name: skill-trigger-eval-subprocess-blindness
plugins.description: Diagnose 0% recall results from skill-creator's trigger evaluation loop. Explains why introspection/audit skills appear to never fire in `run_eval.py`/`run_loop.py` even with perfect descriptions, and how to distinguish subprocess blindness from a genuinely broken description.
